basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: The latest All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) posts! Published by AIIMS Delhi on its official website, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants up to 40 years of age and possessing a First Class Post Graduate Degree with relevant experience, PhD, or First Class Engineering/IT/CS Graduate Degree with three years of experience can apply through email mode on or before 15 June 2026. Find all details about the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-II

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degrees with three Years Experience or PhD, Second Class post graduate degree, including the integrated PG degree with PhD and three Years Experience, For Engineering/IT/CS - First Class Graduate Degree of four years with three Years Experience, Desired: Experience in Cell Biology, Tissue Engineering, 3D-Printing, Animal handling
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical): First Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degrees with three Years Experience or PhD. Second Class post graduate degree, including the integrated PG degree with PhD and three Years Experience. For Engineering/IT/CS - First Class Graduate Degree of four years with three Years Experience. Desired: Experience in Cell Biology, Tissue Engineering, 3D-Printing, Animal handling

salary_details.details: Rs. 67,000/- + HRA, as per ICMR Guidelines Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a First Class Post Graduate Degree with three years of experience or a PhD. For Engineering/IT/CS, a four-year Graduate Degree with three years of experience is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 40 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this contractual role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 67,000/- per month, plus HRA, as per ICMR guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Online Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this AIIMS Delhi job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any specific desired experiences for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in Cell Biology, Tissue Engineering, 3D-Printing, and Animal handling is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The job type is specified as Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.
